description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with an Arch Linux container that compiles and tests fcitx5 with both GCC and Clang compilers in a matrix strategy. Install dependencies, check out and build fcitx5 and its dependency xcb-imdkit, cache fcitx5 data files, and perform CodeQL analysis.
